nodes.name: Blue-headed crested flycatcher
nodes.summary: Blue-headed crested flycatcher（Trochocercus nitens）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Blue-headed crested flycatcher。

nodes.name: Blue-mantled crested flycatcher
nodes.summary: Blue-mantled crested flycatcher（Trochocercus cyanomelas）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Blue-mantled crested flycatcher。

nodes.name: Trochocercus
nodes.summary: Trochocercus（Trochocercus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联2种鸟类，如Blue-headed crested flycatcher、Blue-mantled crested flycatcher。
